case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORP. VS. ELMER LADISLAO CALANGIAN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT CALANGIAN, ELMER LADISLAO PAGSANJAN, CARLA DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-17-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-15-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-02-2003

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-01-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-17-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-02-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-02-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
